questions.question_text:
The table shows the distribution of heights (in cm) of students in a class: 

\begin{array}{|c|c|}
\hline
\text{Heights (in cm)} & \text{Number of students} \\
\hline
125 - 129 & 5 \\
130 - 134 & 21 \\
135 - 139 & 23 \\
140 - 144 & 7 \\
145 - 149 & 4 \\
\hline
\end{array}

(a) Draw a histogram for the distribution.
